---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the lifecycle, auditors, or executors
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve**
Describe the gap or limitation you're hitting.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see added or changed.

**Which part of the system does this affect**
- [ ] start skill (discovery, design options, spec review)
- [ ] lifecycle controller (stage sequencing, repair loop)
- [ ] planning subagent (spec normalization, classification)
- [ ] executor (ui / backend / db / ml / refactor / testing / integration)
- [ ] auditor (spec-completion / security / code-quality / ui / db-schema / dead-code)
- [ ] status / audit / repair / resume skills
- [ ] other
